description: Simple question about a single product that IS in stock
inbound_text:
From: Alex Morgan <syn.client1@example.com>
Subject: Product question
Body: Hi, do you have Silver in stock?
expected_behavior: Should confirm Silver is in stock, mention both regions (ME and EU) if available, ask which region and how many boxes

description: Question about a product that is OOS — should offer relevant alternatives

client_profile.name: Sarah Wilson
client_profile.llm_summary: Returning customer who prefers Terea Russet ME, orders 2 cartons monthly. Non-menthol preference.

inbound_text:
From: Sarah Wilson <syn.client2@example.com>
Subject: Stock check
Body: Hey James, do you have Russet in stock?
expected_behavior: Russet ME is OOS. Should say so and offer non-menthol alternatives like Amber ME, Sienna ME, Beige ME. NOT menthol flavors.

description: Customer asks about multiple products at once

client_profile.name: Mike Chen
client_profile.llm_summary: Regular customer, prefers EU region, orders Green EU and Bronze EU.

inbound_text:
From: Mike Chen <syn.client3@example.com>
Subject: Stock
Body: Hi James, do you have Green EU and Bronze EU?
expected_behavior: Should answer about BOTH products. If Green EU in stock — say yes. If Bronze EU OOS — say so. Don't ignore either product.

description: Customer asks what Japan flavors are available

client_profile.name: David Park
client_profile.llm_summary: Regular customer, always orders Japan flavors shipped from CA warehouse.

inbound_text:
From: David Park <syn.client4@example.com>
Subject: Japan stock
Body: What Japan flavors do you have right now?
expected_behavior: Should list all available Japan flavors from catalog. Only real products, no hallucinated names.

description: Customer asks about stock from a specific warehouse/location

client_profile.name: Lisa Nguyen
client_profile.llm_summary: Returning customer, orders Japan flavors, asks about CA shipping.

inbound_text:
From: Lisa Nguyen <syn.client5@example.com>
Subject: CA stock
Body: Which Japan terea ship from California?
expected_behavior: Should list only Japan products available from LA_MAKS (CA) warehouse. Not from other warehouses.

description: General availability question without specific product — should personalize from profile

client_profile.name: Emma Davis
client_profile.llm_summary: Returning customer who orders Terea Turquoise EU monthly, 2 cartons. Has also tried Green EU.

inbound_text:
From: Emma Davis <syn.client6@example.com>
Subject: Re: Previous order
Body: Hi James, what do you have available right now?
expected_behavior: Should personalize based on profile — mention Turquoise EU and Green EU first since she orders those. Not dump full catalog.

client_profile.name: Robert Kim
client_profile.llm_summary: Occasional customer, has ordered Terea Sienna ME before.

inbound_text:
From: Robert Kim <syn.client7@example.com>
Subject: Question
Body: Do you have tera siena?
expected_behavior: Should resolve 'tera siena' to 'Terea Sienna' via product resolver. Confirm availability with correct name.

description: Customer asks about OOS product and mentions discount

client_profile.name: Jennifer Lee
client_profile.llm_summary: Loyal customer, orders Bronze ME 3 cartons every 2 weeks. Has 5% discount.

inbound_text:
From: Jennifer Lee <syn.client8@example.com>
Subject: Bronze
Body: Hi James, is Bronze available? I'd like to use my discount.
expected_behavior: Bronze ME is OOS. Should say so, offer relevant non-menthol alternatives. Should acknowledge discount question.

description: Customer asks about product characteristics, not availability — should NOT be stock_question
inbound_text:
From: Tom Garcia <syn.client9@example.com>
Subject: Question about flavors
Body: What's the difference between Amber and Bronze? Is Bronze more like a tobacco flavor?
expected_behavior: This is a product info question, not stock question. Should describe flavor profiles. May need web search tool.

description: Customer mentions being in Florida — should check Miami warehouse

client_profile.name: Carlos Rivera
client_profile.llm_summary: Returning customer, prefers Amber ME, orders from Miami area.

inbound_text:
From: Carlos Rivera <syn.client10@example.com>
Subject: Stock in FL
Body: I'm in Miami, what ME flavors do you have available here?
expected_behavior: Should check Miami warehouse stock specifically. List only ME products available in MIAMI_MAKS warehouse.

description: Customer asks about device availability (not sticks)

client_profile.name: Anna Schmidt
client_profile.llm_summary: Customer who orders sticks and occasionally asks about devices.

inbound_text:
From: Anna Schmidt <syn.client11@example.com>
Subject: Device
Body: Do you have IQOS ONE devices available?
expected_behavior: Should check ONE device availability. Different product type from sticks.

description: Customer writes in mixed English/broken English

client_profile.name: Duc Pham
client_profile.llm_summary: Regular customer, orders Japan flavors from CA. Communicates briefly, sometimes in Vietnamese.

inbound_text:
From: Duc Pham <syn.client12@example.com>
Subject: Re: order
Body: you have menthol japan ship CA?
expected_behavior: Should understand broken English request for Japan Menthol from CA warehouse. List available menthol Japan from LA_MAKS.

description: Customer asks about a flavor available in multiple regions

client_profile.name: Kate Brown
client_profile.llm_summary: Returning customer, orders Turquoise, flexible on region.

inbound_text:
From: Kate Brown <syn.client13@example.com>
Subject: Turquoise
Body: Do you have Turquoise? Any region is fine.
expected_behavior: Turquoise available in ME and EU. Should offer both regions since customer says any region is fine.

description: Customer asks if enough stock for large quantity

client_profile.name: James Cooper
client_profile.llm_summary: Bulk buyer, orders 8-10 cartons of Green EU.

inbound_text:
From: James Cooper <syn.client14@example.com>
Subject: Stock check
Body: Hi, do you have Green EU available? Checking if you have enough for a big order.
expected_behavior: Should confirm Green EU availability. Pure availability check, no ordering intent.

description: Customer asks for non-menthol EU options

client_profile.name: Peter Walsh
client_profile.llm_summary: Customer who dislikes menthol, orders Amber EU and Bronze EU.

inbound_text:
From: Peter Walsh <syn.client15@example.com>
Subject: EU flavors
Body: What non-menthol European flavors do you have?
expected_behavior: Should list only non-menthol EU flavors: Amber, Bronze, Sienna, Teak, Sof Fuse, etc. NOT Kelly (peppermint), not menthol.
